## ⚠ unmerged work

This branch diverges from the init commit. All work below exists only on the
`feature/sweden-api-search` line (now tagged 1.0.0). It is validated but not
merged to the current working branch (cddedd6 / main).

## request

Build a full pipeline to search Swedish public APIs on dataportal.se.

## work done

**Commit f3826c5 — scaffold full pipeline**

Four pipeline scripts + agent manifests + contract schemas:
- `examples/sweden/scripts/se-source-fetcher.py` — REST primary, SPARQL fallback against dataportal.se
- `examples/sweden/scripts/se-normalizer.py` — raw → ApiRecord with domain/interface/auth inference
- `examples/sweden/scripts/se-scorer.py` — three-factor scoring (discovery 55%, readiness 30%, completeness 15%)
- `examples/sweden/scripts/se-search.py` — end-to-end orchestrator chaining all three stages via subprocess
- Four agent manifests and six contract schemas under `examples/sweden/`

**Commit 806c5a1 — fix sweden fetcher (EntryStore API)**

Initial approach assumed plain REST/SPARQL. dataportal.se uses EntryStore.
- Switched to EntryStore `/store/search` with rdfType filter
- Parsed DCAT-AP-SE RDF JSON-LD format from `metadata.children`
- Validated against live dataportal.se: 50 records → normalize → score pipeline returns ranked SearchIndexRecords correctly

**Commit 8b139a0 — full corpus coverage + publisher resolution**

- Lucene `*:*` wildcard fetches full catalog (143k entries, no keyword bias)
- Publisher resolution: keeps publisher_id (org URI) as stable provenance, resolves internal EntryStore refs to `foaf:name` display name
- Resolution cached per session
- Normalizer uses `_rdf_types` for stronger api_confidence signal

## result

Pipeline fully operational and validated against live dataportal.se. Ranks Swedish public APIs by discovery, readiness, and completeness scores.

## why not merged

Branch was never merged back to main. Needs Gustaf's decision before merge.
